name: wordle-clone
description: Wordle clone — multi-agent vibe-coding learning exercise

scripts.build: npm run build -w @wordle/shared && npm run build -w @wordle/api && npm run build -w @wordle/web
scripts.test: npm test -w @wordle/shared --if-present && npm test -w @wordle/api --if-present && npm test -w @wordle/web --if-present
